query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pro_rata` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `agenciaBB` varchar(20),
  `nrOperacao` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `chaveJ` varchar(50),
  `valorFinanciado` decimal(15,2),
  `comissao` decimal(15,4),
  `dataFinal` varchar(10),
  `qtdParcelasPagas` int,
  `qtdParcelasTotal` int,
  `codOps` varchar(20),
  `codEst` varchar(20),
  `qtdFaltaReceber` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `idx_pro_rata_nrOperacao` (`nrOperacao`),
  INDEX `idx_pro_rata_chaveJ` (`chaveJ`)
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pro_rata` (

  `qtdFaltaReceber` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `idx_pro_rata_nrOperacao` (`nrOperacao`),
  INDEX `idx_pro_rata_chaveJ` (`chaveJ`)
);
